title: Access Medicine Webinar
content:
Access Medicine Webinar

Dear Students,

Access Medicine

is now accessible as part of our library’s electronic resources.

A webinar will be held

on

, between

11:00 AM and 12:00 PM

, during which the platform will be introduced and its content will be examined in detail. Further details are provided below.”

Access Medicine

is an interactive learning solution developed by some of the brightest minds in medicine. It is trusted by

students

and

healthcare professionals

at over 2,200 medical schools and teaching hospitals

in

more than 85 countries

worldwide. The platform helps students enhance their clinical reasoning skills and succeed in courses, clinical rotations, and exam preparation. Additionally, it provides interactive content, self-assessment tools, and leading medical resources for

general practitioners

and

early-career doctors

, helping them strengthen their knowledge and clinical decision-making skills.

Overview of McGraw Hill's new AccessMedicine!

Webinar Participation Link:

https://mcgrawhill.zoom.us/j/86725606631

Platform Access Link:

https://login.proxy.uskudar.edu.tr/login?url=https://accessmedicine.mhmedical.com

*You can log in with your organization email address and password.

**

Click here

to create an Access Medicine user account.

Sincerely.
